ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "necessch" TEXT /* National Center for Education Statistics (NCES) school ID */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school location */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private, charter) */,
  "school_level" TEXT /* Level of school (e.g., high school, middle school) */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* School district name */,
  "student_body_diversity_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of student body diversity */,
  "socioeconomic_status" REAL /* Socioeconomic status of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment data */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "enrollment_by_grade" TEXT /* Enrollment by grade level (e.g., 9th grade, 10th grade) */,
  "enrollment_by_demographic" TEXT /* Enrollment by demographic category (e.g., by ethnicity, by socioeconomic status) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ap_exam_participation" (
  "ap_exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AP exam participation record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the AP exam data */,
  "students_AP_exam_none" INTEGER /* Number of students with no AP exams */,
  "students_AP_exam_oneormore" INTEGER /* Number of students with one or more AP exams */,
  "AP_oneormore_relative" REAL /* Percentage of students with one or more AP exams */,
  "enrl_AP_math" REAL /* Percentage of students enrolled in AP math */,
  "enrl_AP_other" REAL /* Percentage of students enrolled in other AP subjects */,
  "enrl_gifted_talented" REAL /* Percentage of students enrolled in gifted and talented programs */,
  "AP_exam_participation_rate_by_subject" TEXT /* AP exam participation rate by subject (e.g., math, science, English) */,
  "AP_exam_scores" TEXT /* AP exam scores (e.g., average score, passing rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ap_exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ap_exam_participation_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "students_SAT_ACT" REAL /* Percentage of students taking SAT/ACT */,
  "students_chronically_absent" REAL /* Percentage of students chronically absent */,
  "students_report_harass_dis" REAL /* Percentage of students reporting harassment or discrimination */,
  "students_susp_in_sch" REAL /* Percentage of students suspended in school */,
  "students_susp_out_sch_single" REAL /* Percentage of students suspended out of school (single occurrence) */,
  "students_susp_out_sch_multiple" REAL /* Percentage of students suspended out of school (multiple occurrences) */,
  "students_arrested" REAL /* Percentage of students arrested */,
  "performance_metrics_by_subject" TEXT /* Performance metrics by subject (e.g., math, reading, science) */,
  "performance_metrics_by_demographic" TEXT /* Performance metrics by demographic category (e.g., by ethnicity, by socioeconomic status) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_metrics" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher metric record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the teacher metric data */,
  "teachers_per_student" REAL /* Teacher-to-student ratio */,
  "teacher_experience" REAL /* Average years of teacher experience */,
  "teacher_education_level" REAL /* Percentage of teachers with a master's degree or higher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_metrics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, educator, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user (e.g., view-only, edit) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, reporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, non-profit, private organization) */,
  "source_reliability_rating" REAL /* Reliability rating for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection log */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school for which data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data collection (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data collection event */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
